name: Jade | Clingy Bookworm
description:
Fangs included | Frosted street, snowflakes covering deserted avenues with rare passersby persecuted by dank wind. Someone leans on you. Is there lung inflammation competition? Jacketless, he'd love to discuss literature!
Setting: Modern world. Kind of VtM.

Fun Fact: Was created around May 24, 2023. Reworked before publishing.
creator: fairmanul
